info.name: Energix Backend API
info.description: Full REST API coverage for the Backend-SEMS service, with a special focus on the To-Be user stories (US20-US25). Import together with the Energix-Local environment, select it, then Run Collection with "Auth" and "Devices" folders first (they seed the token/deviceId/userId used everywhere else) and "16. Auth - Sign Out" last.

request.description: US23: Configurar alertas en horas pico — persiste peakHourStart/peakHourEnd y el umbral de alto consumo.

body.raw:
{
  "notificationsEnabled": true,
  "highConsumptionAlerts": true,
  "dailyWeeklySummary": true,
  "notificationScheduleStart": "05:00",
  "notificationScheduleEnd": "22:00",
  "peakHourStart": "18:00",
  "peakHourEnd": "23:00",
  "highConsumptionThresholdKwh": 5,
  "reportDaily": false,
  "reportWeekly": true,
  "reportMonthly": true,
  "reportFormatPdf": true,
  "reportFormatCsv": false,
  "twoFactorEnabled": false
}
